architectureVision.statement: Enable DKV through an integrated enterprise architecture spanning business, application, data, and technology domains.
drivers: Reduce fragmentation across organizational and technology change.
Make dependencies and ownership explicit across architecture layers.
Improve governance of strategic change and target-state decisions.

goals.name: 2026-Q1 DKV Ecosystem Stakeholder outcome goal
goals.description: Improve Customer adoption and satisfaction for DKV Ecosystem Stakeholder by advancing operational reliability and outcome clarity through foundational platform execution.

goals.name: 2026-Q2 DKV Ecosystem Stakeholder outcome goal
goals.description: Prepare to improve Customer adoption and satisfaction for DKV Ecosystem Stakeholder by advancing operational reliability and outcome clarity through foundational platform execution.

principles: Business capabilities drive application and technology design.
Information is modeled as a shared enterprise asset.
Technology choices should be standardized unless a domain-specific need justifies variation.
Implementation should be governed against explicit target and transition architectures.
